The '''Zossi Belt''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] located in the [[Faarlsun system/Legends|Faarlsun system]], a part of the [[Parthovian Cluster/Legends|Parthovian Cluster]]<ref name="WbC" /> in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It occupied the second [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around its [[Star/Legends|star]], the [[Color/Legends|yellow-white]] [[Faarlsun]].<ref name="WbC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Zossi Belt was mentioned in the [[1993]] sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="WbC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Faarlsun [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the Zossi Belt, in grid square T-4.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
